title: maresia nana var. glabra
intro: Maresia nana var. glabra, also known as the hairy or glabrous form of Maresia nana, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, Maresia nana var. glabra is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to be consumed as a tea, or applied topically as an ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
